hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'API/Sources'; then echo 'BLOCK: Do not edit generated Apollo code in API/Sources/. Run ./API/apollo-ios-cli generate instead.' && exit 1; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '\.secret|api-key'; then echo 'BLOCK: Do not edit secret/key files.' && exit 1; fi
